top_signals.title: Japan to set special aid category for community-based startups
top_signals.summary: The internal affairs ministry aims to promote what is known as AI transformation, in which companies reform themselves by placing AI at the center.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
